articles.author: James Fernyhough, Elena Giordano, Ben Munster, Ben Makuch
articles.title: Top Brussels official urges Europeans to work from home and drive less - politico.eu
articles.description: Energy commissioner says the oil crisis triggered by Iran war will bring lengthy upheaval, in a speech reminiscent of the Covid pandemic.
articles.content: "The more you can do to save oil, especially diesel, especially jet fuel, the better we are off," Jørgensen said, confirming an earlier report by POLITICO that Brussels wanted Europeans to travel les… [+1554 chars]
